assertions.description: The source .kicad_pcb file is a single-line stub: '(kicad_pcb (version 4) (host kicad "dummy file"))'. The PCB analyzer correctly returns zero footprints, zero nets, and reports routing_complete=true (vacuously true with nothing to route). The statistics all read 0 or None as expected. No error was raised — the .err file simply contains the output path, confirming clean handling of this degenerate case.
